title: Runic Chests
description: Change vanilla bored chests, for runic chests designs for all the chests in game.
body:
![Runic chests in minecraft](https://i.imgur.com/yNuggXx.png)

This resourcepack change the default texture from chests, and replace it with the chests in the images.

Runic chests have unique designs for: ender chest, normal chest, big chest, trapped chest, and big trapped chest.

This resourcepack doesn't add any block, just change the default chests, for the ones shows in images, that's it.
